# DWG Roundtrip Performance Report

**Date:** March 12, 2026  
**Libraries:** acadrust v0.3.0, ACadSharp v3.4.9 (dxf-rs has no DWG support)  
**Platform:** Windows, Release mode (`opt-level=3`, `lto=thin`)  
**Test data:** DWG files generated by acadrust from mixed entity sets

---

## Summary

**acadrust is 1.9–2.7× faster than ACadSharp for DWG roundtrip** (read → modify → write) at all scales.

dxf-rs does not support DWG format.

---

## Roundtrip Results

All times in **milliseconds** (lower is better).

| Scale | Entities | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Small | 100 | **1.63** | 4.29 | 2.63× |
| Medium | 1,000 | **6.47** | — | — |
| Large | 10,000 | **30.18** | 89.71 | 2.97× |
| Huge | 100,000 | **400.51** | 1069.59 | 2.67× |

> Medium-scale ACadSharp roundtrip data was not available in the test run.

---

## Observations

- acadrust maintains a consistent **~2.7× advantage** across scales, showing good linear scaling.
- The DWG roundtrip combines parsing + writing overhead; acadrust's lead here reflects its advantages in both operations.
- At huge scale (100K entities), acadrust completes the full roundtrip in ~400 ms vs ACadSharp's ~1,070 ms — a ~670 ms difference that compounds in batch processing workflows.
